title: Add 'About Actuality Studio' section below hero

requirements.text: Generate a historic 1902 black-and-white photo-style illustration of McKinley Elementary School exterior in Spokane, WA, and a current modern exterior photo-style illustration of the same building, both suitable for side-by-side display in the About section.

quotes: side-by-side historic 1902 photo and current exterior of McKinley Elementary School Spokane, WA

acceptanceCriteria: Two images are generated: one representing the 1902 historic exterior and one representing the current exterior of McKinley Elementary School.
Images are saved as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.
Both images are visually distinct — the historic image has a sepia/black-and-white aesthetic and the current image appears in full color.

requirements.text: Add an 'About Actuality Studio' section on the LandingPage (frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx) immediately below the HeroSection, using a 2-column layout. The left column contains the heading 'About Actuality Studio' and the descriptive text: 'A decentralized platform on Dfinity's Internet Computer for creating ADU-based pocket neighborhoods and small co-housing communities. Secure, transparent, and truly sovereign.' The right column displays the two generated McKinley Elementary School images (1902 historic and current exterior) side by side with appropriate labels. Below the left column text, include a call-to-action button labeled 'View Memberships' that navigates to the /membership route.

quotes: Add an 'About Actuality Studio' section below the hero with 2-column layout.

Left: descriptive text – 'A decentralized platform on Dfinity's Internet Computer for creating ADU-based pocket neighborhoods and small co-housing communities. Secure, transparent, and truly sovereign.'
Right: side-by-side historic 1902 photo and current exterior of McKinley Elementary School Spokane, WA.
Include call-to-action button linking to Memberships.

acceptanceCriteria: The 'About Actuality Studio' section appears directly below the HeroSection on the landing page.
The section uses a 2-column grid layout on desktop; columns stack vertically on mobile.
Left column displays the heading 'About Actuality Studio' and the full descriptive text as specified.
A 'View Memberships' CTA button is present below the descriptive text in the left column and navigates to /membership when clicked.
Right column displays both McKinley Elementary School images side by side, with a label or caption identifying '1902' and 'Today' (or similar).
Section styling is consistent with the existing autumn/warm OKLCH color palette and typography used throughout the app (Playfair Display headings, Space Grotesk body text).

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Generated images must be stored in frontend/public/assets/generated and referenced as static asset paths.
Navigation to /membership must use TanStack Router, consistent with the existing routing setup in App.tsx.
nonGoals: Do not add new backend endpoints or modify backend/main.mo.
Do not redesign or alter the existing HeroSection component.
Do not add real external photos; use generated image assets only.

required: Black-and-white sepia-toned historic exterior of a two-story early 1900s red-brick elementary school with arched windows, a prominent entrance, and period-appropriate landscaping (mckinley-1902.dim_600x400.png)
Full-color contemporary exterior of a restored two-story red-brick elementary school with modern landscaping, clear blue sky, and well-maintained grounds (mckinley-current.dim_600x400.png)
